title: Codex visual review S15 panel a1

payload.failure_mode_positive_invariant: executor=blue hoodie+brown hair+no beard, reviewer=green hoodie+near-black hair+beard; pixel chibi; baked English caption legible+correct ('CLAIM AUDIT', 'RESEARCH WIKI', 'VERDICT - WARN_corrected'); keep three-band layout + clean text safezone.
payload.notes: Codex visual review returned (GPT-5.5 xhigh) independent read of panels/S15_panel_a01.png, CLI -i path, RC=0。本面板 is_baked_duo=true。executor 蓝 hoodie 棕发无须、reviewer 绿 hoodie 黑发有须双人身份在像素风格下稳定，与 identity_refs 一致，identity_consistency=5。像素霓虹风格整体统一、深蓝 wiki 空间与中心 claim-audit/verdict 可视化配色贴合，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线导向中心 verdict 戳记与 research-wiki 写入动作，composition_readability=5。刻意烘焙的英文文案清晰、拼写正确、无字形损坏，baked_text_quality=5；observed_literals=['CLAIM AUDIT','RESEARCH WIKI','VERDICT - WARN_corrected']，与 B08 通胀审计裁决/收尾语义一致，content_corruption_present=false。无非预期杂散字形（stray_text_present=false），近乎无字形噪点，artifact_severity=1（极轻微）。已预留干净文字安全区（safezone_present=true）。与 Gemini 在 identity 上完全一致（均=5，disagreeId=0）。正向不变量：双人身份锚定 + baked 英文文案可读正确 + 三段分区版式 + 文字安全区保持。
